steps_raw.instruction: If tissue stored at -80 °C , place in -20 °C for at least 04:00:00 or Overnight to thaw prior to homogenization.
Prepare 1X TNE with phosphatase and protease inhibitors.
Add in 10 volumes of 1X TNE. 10 µL of TNE per 1 mg of tissue. Ex: 50 mg tissue = 500 µL of 1X TNE.
Either by mechanical (Dounce) or homogenizer machine, homogenize tissue gently and On ice .
This is TNE crude lysate (no detergents).
Take specific volume of tissue in TNE and add in equal volume of 1X TNE w/ 2% Triton X-100 (Tx100). Ex. 150 µL of TNE tissue + 150 µL 1X TNE+2% Tx100.
Wash pellet in 150 µL of 1X TNE+1% Tx100. Note : Same volume that was used above from TNE.
Resuspend pellet in 75 µL to 100 µL of cTNE.
Supernatant from this is the insoluble fraction .

Supernatant = soluble . Save supernatant and add equal volume of complete TNE (cTNE). Sonicate @ 4 °C : 3 pluses: 00:00:10 ON / 00:00:02 OFF. Boil: 00:10:00 at 95 °C . Spin down: 16000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes . Supernatant from this is the soluble fraction .
Spin down. Option 1 : 16000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes . Option 2 : 20000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour ( 25000 x g, °C, ) .
